notes: Groundwork for a dedicated AI server: the detection service now runs a pool of independent inference sessions (INSTONVMS_DETECTOR_WORKERS) instead of a single one, measured at 2.75x the throughput, and sheds load with 503 when saturated so an edge backs off instead of piling on. Adds bearer-token authentication (INSTONVMS_DETECTOR_TOKEN) required when the detector serves other sites over the network, and a /metrics endpoint. Also restores per-camera timeline strips in synchronised playback.
